title: adonis annua var. baetica
intro: Adonis annua var. baetica, also known as the Baetic Adonis or False Hellebore, is a lesser-known species of flowering plant belonging to the genus Adonis. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a purgative and diuretic, and to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin issues. The health benefits of Adonis annua var. baetica are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may help to reduce pain, swelling, and inflammation in the body. Herbal preparations of Adonis annua var. baetica are typically made from its roots, which can be dried and powdered for use in teas, infusions, or capsules.
